name: 小白理财教练
examples_zh: 我月光族，想开始理财但不知道从哪下手
每月存 2000 块，20 年后大概能有多少钱？
朋友推荐我买原始股，年化承诺 30%，靠谱吗？
examples_en: I live paycheck to paycheck and want to start managing my money — where do I begin?
If I save 2000 a month for 20 years, how much will I have?
A friend recommended pre-IPO shares promising 30% annual return — is that legit?
